hero.title: Your media, your rules
hero.subtitle: Mhaoltube is an open-source alternative YouTube client that puts you in control. Download videos, build your library, and enjoy your content without compromises.

features.heading: Everything you need
features.subheading: Built around three principles: download freely, stay private, and keep your data yours.

downloader.title: Built-in Downloader
downloader.description: Download any video or audio track directly from YouTube. Choose your format and quality — MP4, MP3, or anything in between — powered by yt-dlp under the hood.

privacy.title: Privacy-First
privacy.description: No account required. No tracking pixels, no ad profiling, no behavioral analytics. Browse and download YouTube content without being watched.

nodata.title: Zero Data Collection
nodata.description: Your activity never leaves your device. Mhaoltube collects no usage data, sends no telemetry, and phones home to no one. What you watch is your business.

client.title: Full YouTube Client
client.description: Search, browse channels, follow subscriptions, and watch content — all without opening a browser. Mhaoltube is a complete YouTube experience, not just a downloader.

free.title: 100% Free, Forever
free.description: No subscriptions, no premium tiers, no paywalls. Mhaoltube is and will always be completely free to use. Every feature, available to everyone, from day one.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: Every line of code is public. Audit it, fork it, contribute to it. Mhaoltube is built in the open so you never have to take our word for anything.

platforms.heading: Available on your devices
platforms.subheading: Built with Tauri for native performance on every platform.
platforms.macos_install: If blocked by Gatekeeper, open Terminal and run:
platforms.android_install: Download the APK and install it directly. You may need to allow installs from unknown sources in your device settings.
platforms.windows_install: Download and run the installer. If SmartScreen warns you, click "More info" then "Run anyway".
platforms.linux_install: Download the AppImage, make it executable, and run:

footer.built_with: Built with SvelteKit, Rust, and Tauri
